ab: Embiyax namu kana? prajing ta da!
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.
A: Please stand up! Salute!
B: Hello.
A: Please sit down.

ab: Embiyax namu kana? emptgsa ku quri uqun Truku ka sayang.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的太魯閣語怎麼說。
en: A: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Telugu.

ab: Mkla su qmbahang ka kari mu hug?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: Mtgsa,ini ku kla.rngaw pxal duri hug?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: Ini ku qbahang, paru hari hnang su rmngaw hug?
ch: B:我聽不到，可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.
It’s very well read.

ab: Spug pxal duri.paru hari hnang su.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.
Please be quiet. Don’t talk.
A: Please take out your textbook.
B: Yes, sir.
A: Please take out your pen.

ab: Mtgsa, smhungi ku madas ppatas da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.
A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: Mtgsa, smhungi ku madas ssrus da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: Siyuk kiyig mnseupu matas sunan ka ssrus.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.
B: Can I borrow your eraser?
Class is over.

ab: Bitaq hini ka slhayan ta han,strung ta babaw sngayan duri.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
